name: @dtc/cms-contract
description: Single CMS schema contract: the FieldDef catalog surface + backend publish-validation annotations + the validator/digest generator. NOT yet npm-linked (root workspaces are apps/** and npm install is prohibited on this deployment — node_modules carries hand patches); consumed via the generator's emitted artifacts (backend) and byte-untouched direct source (storefront). See src/index.ts header for the full resolution rationale.
